  1. org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
Stream-based batch listener components for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support
Support classes for stream-based batch listener components in Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
Stream-based task lifecycle listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support used by org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
    Class
    Description
    MessagePublisher
    Utility class that sends batch job listener payloads to the notification channel.
    TaskBatchEventListenerBeanPostProcessor
    Attaches the listeners to the job and its steps.
    TaskEventProperties
     
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support used by org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support
    Class
    Description
    ExitStatus
    ExitStatus DTO created so that ExitStatus can be serialized into Json without. having to add mixins to an ObjectMapper
    JobInstanceEvent
    This is a JobInstance DTO created so that a JobInstance can be serialized into Json without having to add mixins to an ObjectMapper.
    JobParameterEvent
    This is a JobParameter DTO created so that a JobParameter can be serialized into Json without having to add mixins to an ObjectMapper.
    JobParametersEvent
    This is a JobParametersEvent DTO created so that a JobParameters can be serialized into Json without having to add mixins to an ObjectMapper.
    StepExecutionEvent
    This is a StepExecution DTO created so that a StepExecution can be serialized into Json without having to add mixins to an ObjectMapper.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support used by org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
    Class
    Description
    TaskEventProperties
